data.label: Brand Swap Brief
data.prompt:
Use this workflow for scaffolded Next.js sites where the interaction shell already works.

Goal:
1. Map exactly what must be swapped
2. Build a source-of-truth replacement manifest
3. Plan from the manifest
4. Execute later only when assets exist

Hard rules:
- Do not feature-map the whole app
- Do not redesign GSAP/framer-motion/cursor/layout shell systems
- Treat swap-features.json and .plan/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.json as canonical truth sources
- If assets are missing, stop in planning-only mode

data.description: app-spec-agent — map swap targets, directories, constraints, and locked systems
data.agentDefinition: Maps only the swap surface for a scaffolded brand-swap site. Outputs exact paths, replacement types, constraints, and locked systems. Does not do generic feature mapping.
data.prompt: Inspect the repo as a brand-swap cloning target. Output swap targets, exact files/directories, replacement classifications, size and placement constraints, locked systems, and required asset checklist.

data.label: Write Swap Inventory
data.prompt: Persist the app-spec-agent output into docs/plans/<date>-swap-inventory.md. This becomes the first durable init artifact.

data.description: Init-agent — convert inventory into exact asset replacement contract
data.agentDefinition: Consumes the swap inventory and outputs exact assets to create, typography and placement constraints, colour contract, logo/vector contract, media contract, content injection rules, and exclusions.
data.prompt: Using the swap inventory as the only source of truth, build an asset-replacement contract. Include typography by screen size, logo placement and size, colour roles, videos/images, buttons, labels, content blocks, contact/social data, SEO assets, and locked-system exclusions.

data.label: Write Manifest + .plan
data.prompt:
Write or update:
- docs/plans/<date>-asset-replacement-contract.md
- docs/plans/<date>-swap-features.json
- .plan/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.json

The manifest must contain typography, breakpoints, logo placement and size, colours, media requirements, content areas, locked systems, verification checks, and status fields like ready / pending_asset / blocked.

data.label: Assets Ready Gate
data.prompt:
Decision point:
- If required assets are missing, stop in planning-only mode and update the manifest status.
- If required assets are ready, continue into the GSD planning phase.

data.label: Planning-Only Mode
data.prompt: Stop here if branding/media assets are not available. Keep the repo in pending-assets mode. The manifest is the asset intake brief for later execution.

data.name: gsd-new-project
data.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md

data.name: gsd-plan-phase
data.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop

data.label: GSD Constraint
data.prompt: GSD must plan only from .plan/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.json and swap-features.json. It should plan by replacement units, not generic app features.

data.name: gsd-execute-phase
data.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization

data.name: gsd-ui-review
data.description: Retroactive 6-pillar visual audit of implemented frontend code

data.name: gsd-verify-work
data.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT

data.label: Evaluator Agent
data.prompt: Later evaluator phase: read swap-features.json and verify each replacement unit against size, placement, breakpoint, colour, content, and locked-system constraints. Return PASS / FLAG / BLOCK.
